systemPrompt: Independent operations that SOP can parallelize, then combine

steps.prompt: Add 10 and 20, and also multiply 5 by 6. Then add those two results together. Answer only with the final number.
Reverse the text 'abc' and also uppercase the text 'xyz'. Then concatenate the two results. Answer only with the final text.
Get the length of 'hello', the length of 'world', and the length of 'test'. Then add all three numbers together. Answer only with the number.
